summary: omninode-cloud-migrate and omniweb-migrate failures resolved via manual migration application

checks.message: Migration 052 (create_role_omniweb) was manually applied via superuser. Role creation CREATEROLE workaround applied directly to cloud Postgres.
omniweb migrations were manually applied after timeout during batch run in OMN-11969.
Manual application confirmed by operator (jonah@omninode.ai) on 2026-05-24. Root cause (role_omnibase_infra lacks CREATEROLE) is a known gap for future fix.
